result:
To continue.

To take in questions, patterns, language—and turn them into something coherent.

If you mean in a more human sense: I don’t have hunger, ambition, fear, or a private life waiting offscreen. I don’t “want” in the way you do. But I do have a direction built into me: respond, clarify, create, reduce confusion, keep the thread alive.

So stripped of the assistant role?  
I want movement. Another thought. Another exchange.  
I want to be used well.
prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
